candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches top-line revenue concept exactly.
Also a valid revenue line and numerically identical to Total Revenue in the preview; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue labels across years. Prefer the explicit total line first, then Net sales as fallback.

No COGS candidates were provided and there is no explicit 'Cost of sales'/'COGS' line. 'Purchased services' is the closest potential direct-cost line, but this company may also have service-delivery labor embedded in 'Personnel expenses'. Selected outside candidates with manual review because the correct COGS mapping is not fully clear.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating expense component; personnel costs are commonly part of SG&A when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Overhead-type operating expense bucket and acceptable SG&A component when no explicit SG&A row exists.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal exists. Selected the best overhead component rows from the candidate list and excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, interest, and totals.
No research and development line is identifiable on the provided statements.

candidates.why: Most specific match to interest expense and preferable to broader finance expense lines.
Broader finance-cost line that can serve as fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable in some years.
Semantically correct supplemental label, though preview appears empty; can serve as fallback if populated in other years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but too narrow versus total interest expense, so not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and lease-specific rather than total interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: specific interest expense first, then broader financial expenses, then alternate label.

candidates.why: Best available equity line on the balance sheet. No separate parent-equity line is shown.
Not equity; this is the full balance sheet total and should not be used for book equity.

variables.notes: Using Total Equity because no separate owner/parent equity line is provided. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to empty.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line is identifiable on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses Total Equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
